---
name: Hardware compatibility report
about: Tell us whether monitoring / fan control worked on your machine
title: "[HW] "
labels: hardware
---

**Machine**
- Mac model *or* motherboard / laptop model:
- CPU / GPU:

**Results**
- Temperatures shown? (yes / partial / no)
- Fans detected? (how many)
- Fan control working? (yes / no)

**Details**
- Running as administrator? (yes/no)
- T2 Mac: is Macs Fan Control installed? (yes/no)
- Attach `%AppData%\OpenFanControl\smc-debug.log` (Macs) if control didn't work.

**Anything else**
